title: Executive Order 12897—Garnishment of Federal Employees' Pay

flags.justification: A narrow, specific delegation of rulemaking authority to implement one statutory provision, split cleanly between OPM and the Postmaster General.
Single purpose: implementing one statutory garnishment provision.
A pure delegation of rulemaking authority; substantive standards will come from the subsequent regulations, not this order.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
A standing regulatory implementation function, evergreen by nature.
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No third-party compliance regime is created by this pure delegation order.
A narrow, technical delegation; no novel authority claim.
A clean division between OPM and the Postmaster General with no overlap.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.
